Speaker.rawBytes: EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E5 B2 B3 E7 BE BD 20 E3 82 86 E3 81 8B E3 82 8A
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E5 B1 B1 E5 B2 B8 20 E9 A2 A8 E8 8A B1

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}You took off that fast, and you still haven't gone inside?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}We'll wait outside. It wouldn't be good for all of us to charge in...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Her damaged endocrine system and other internal organs have completely healed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}She's still weak, but... there's no more danger of her dying in two years.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Transmogrification is the proof that one lacks "potential"... I had a feeling this might be the case.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}This is Kirijo-san and Iori-kun. They were your friends last year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 3 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I'm sorry... It hasn't quite hit me yet, but I guess I don't remember anything of the past few years...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 3 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It's like... I was having a really long dream.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}It seems all of her memories after she awakened to her Persona are gone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}She remembers everything that happened before then, but as for you all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Nah... I think... it's better for her that she doesn't remember.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}All that stuff about the fighting, and the suppressants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}When you're having a nightmare... it's better to be able to wake up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 2 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I didn't say it was a nightmare. Don't put words in my mouth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 1 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}It was a dream of meeting a kind, warm person at the end of a long tunnel...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 1 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I can't remember it clearly... But I wanted to make him happy, and I...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 3 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I think... there were flowers... A room filled with them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Chidori! Take it easy, don't force yourself to remember.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}If she can remember that part clearly, then maybe...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Do you remember how she'd occasionally use her power to make flowers bloom again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}She'd always do it for the flowers in her room on the days when Iori-kun would visit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}And she would always spend more time on the flowers she received from you, Iori-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}She never even looked at me when I brought them in though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Any flower she touched would be mysteriously preserved...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I ended up keeping them all for my research.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}But after the autopsy, I put them all on her chest as a tribute.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Now that I think about it, that must have been the night she began to transmogrify...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}The power to share one's life with others...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}Could she have reclaimed the life energy she'd given to those flowers...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}But, compared to her previous state, she's changed. The loss of her power is part of it, but furthermore—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 2 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}Excuse me... Are you talking about me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}We were talking about how you want to live now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}What do you mean by that? Of course I want to live.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 1 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}{f 4 23 0 213 1 25 25}I have to find the person in my dream someday... I don't have time to lie in bed forever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Supposing you do find him... What will you do after that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}The strength of two hearts connected brought about a miracle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 61 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}I've never been so happy in my entire life![n]{f 1 1}
